summary: Inbound healing voice agent for cypherofhealing.com — LLM-guided intake triage, CRM routing, and optional email follow-up.

workerDomain.description: Branded custom domain for the deployed worker.

intakePhoneNumber.description: Telnyx inbound number to route healing intake calls from.

enableEmailFollowUp.description: Send email follow-up after each intake session.

enableCompliance.description: Enable compliance primitive for HIPAA-adjacent transcript redaction.

templates.label: Full — email + compliance
templates.hint: Email follow-up enabled with compliance transcript redaction.

templates.label: Minimal — intake only
templates.hint: Intake triage only; no email or compliance layer.
